# Navin Kumar — Freelance Ruby on Rails Developer & Engineering Leader

> Navin Kumar is an **available-for-hire freelance Ruby on Rails developer and engineering consultant** with 9+ years of experience. He is open to freelance projects, contract engagements, remote consulting, and team augmentation for startups and enterprises worldwide.

**Website:** https://rubyonrails.tech
**Email:** navinkumar2508@gmail.com
**Phone / WhatsApp:** +91 97386 77711
**LinkedIn:** https://linkedin.com/in/dynamicnavin
**GitHub:** https://github.com/Navin-Baliyase
**Location:** India (available remotely worldwide)
**Availability:** Open to freelance, contract, and consulting work

---

## Hire Navin Kumar — Ruby on Rails Developer

If you are looking for a **freelance Ruby on Rails developer**, a **Ruby on Rails contractor**, a **backend Ruby engineer for hire**, or an **engineering consultant** to lead or augment your team, Navin Kumar is available.

He works with:
- Startups building their first SaaS product on Rails
- Scale-ups migrating monoliths to microservices
- Enterprises needing a senior Rails contractor or tech lead
- Teams that need temporary or ongoing engineering leadership

**Contact to hire:** navinkumar2508@gmail.com | +91 97386 77711

---

## Services Offered

### Ruby on Rails Development
Full-stack and backend Rails development — REST APIs, background jobs, database design, performance tuning, and feature delivery. Experienced with Rails 5, 6, 7.

### Microservices Architecture & Migration
Design and execution of monolith-to-microservices migrations. Service decomposition, inter-service communication, data consistency strategies.

### Cloud Infrastructure (AWS / Azure)
Cloud architecture, infrastructure-as-code with AWS CloudFormation, CI/CD pipeline setup, container orchestration, and deployment automation.

### Engineering Leadership & Team Augmentation
Fractional Engineering Manager or Tech Lead for teams that need hands-on leadership. Sprint planning, code reviews, mentorship, hiring, and roadmap alignment.

### SaaS Platform Development
End-to-end SaaS product development including multi-tenancy, subscription billing integration, role-based access control, and third-party API integrations.

### Performance Optimization & Scaling
Profiling and optimizing slow Rails applications — database query tuning, caching (Redis), background job optimization, and load testing.

### Data Engineering (ETL/ELT)
Building data pipelines using AWS Glue, ETL/ELT workflows, and data warehousing integrations.

---

## Why Hire Navin Kumar

- **9+ years** of professional Ruby on Rails experience
- Led engineering teams serving **10,000+ enterprise users**
- Delivered **~30% performance improvements** through caching and DB optimization
- Maintained **99.9%+ uptime** on production SaaS systems
- Proven track record at CloudBolt Software (enterprise cloud management SaaS)
- Available for **remote work** across US, EU, and APAC time zones
- Communicates clearly with both technical and non-technical stakeholders

---

## About

Navin Kumar is an Engineering Leader and freelance Ruby on Rails developer based in Deoghar, Jharkhand, India. He has 9+ years of experience architecting scalable SaaS platforms, leading distributed engineering teams, and building cloud-native systems on AWS and Azure.

He is currently a Lead Software Engineer at CloudBolt Software and is **open to freelance and contract engagements** on the side or exclusively depending on scope.

---

## Professional Experience

### Lead Software Engineer — CloudBolt Software (June 2022 – Present)
- Led a team of 5+ engineers delivering enterprise SaaS solutions serving 10,000+ users
- Spearheaded monolith-to-microservices migration improving scalability and reducing technical debt
- Improved deployment frequency from bi-weekly to weekly releases via CI/CD optimization
- Enhanced system performance through caching and DB tuning, reducing response time by ~30%
- Maintained 99.9%+ system uptime through resilient architecture design and monitoring

### Senior Software Engineer — CloudBolt Software (October 2020 – June 2022)
- Designed scalable REST APIs and backend services handling high-volume enterprise workloads
- Automated infrastructure provisioning using AWS CloudFormation
- Mentored junior engineers reducing onboarding time by ~30%

### Senior Software Development Engineer — MyUpchar.com (September 2019 – October 2020)
- Architected backend systems supporting e-commerce operations and warehouse automation
- Improved operational efficiency by ~40% through backend workflow automation

### Software Engineer — Kreatio Software Pvt Ltd (August 2016 – March 2019)
- Developed scalable Ruby on Rails applications and RESTful services
- Supported AWS/Azure deployments and performance optimization initiatives

---

## Skills

- **Backend:** Ruby, Ruby on Rails, REST APIs, Microservices, Sidekiq, RSpec
- **Cloud:** AWS (EC2, RDS, S3, Lambda, CloudFormation, Glue), Azure
- **Databases:** PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB, Redis, Elasticsearch
- **Data:** ETL/ELT, AWS Glue, Data Warehousing
- **DevOps:** CI/CD, Docker, GitHub Actions, Jenkins
- **Leadership:** Engineering Management, Agile/Scrum, System Design, Technical Roadmapping

## Engagement Models

| Model | Description |
|---|---|
| Project-based | Fixed scope, fixed price — ideal for new features, migrations, audits |
| Hourly / Retainer | Ongoing contract — ideal for product teams needing a senior Rails engineer |
| Team Augmentation | Embedded as a senior engineer or tech lead within your existing team |
| Consulting / Audit | Architecture review, performance audit, code review, or technical due diligence |
